westlaw-mcp.description: Unified legal research across 11 databases — Westlaw Classic (institutional), CourtListener (free), Congress.gov (free key), Federal Register (free), eCFR (free), EUR-Lex (free), Taiwan Judicial Yuan (free), EU Compliance (free), OECD Tax Treaties, SEC EDGAR (free), Singapore eLitigation. Vaquill AI provides an alternative semantic search path for US opinions, USC, and CFR.

vaquill-legal.description: Semantic search across 8M+ US federal/state court opinions, USC, and CFR via Vaquill AI

auslaw.description: Australian case law and legislation via AustLII with PDF OCR support

slack.description: Search messages, read channels, post updates

google-drive.description: Search, read, and fetch documents from Google Drive

exa.description: AI-native search — finds expert legal commentary, law firm publications, academic papers, regulatory news, and specialist articles across any language

fetch.description: Web content retrieval — reads any URL and converts to clean text for analysis

sequential-thinking.description: Structured multi-step reasoning chains for complex legal analysis

agents.name: adversary
agents.description: Constructs the strongest counter-arguments against a legal position. Identifies weaknesses, unfavorable precedent, and regulatory risks.

agents.name: advocate
agents.description: Builds the strongest possible case FOR a legal position. Marshals favorable authorities and constructs persuasive argument chains.

agents.name: case-researcher
agents.description: Multi-source deep case research with citation verification

agents.name: citation-checker
agents.description: Validates citations against MCP data sources, checks for overruling or negative treatment, and ensures correct formatting.

agents.name: compliance
agents.description: Regulatory compliance assessment across jurisdictions. Covers AML/KYC, sanctions, FATF, CRS/AEOI, substance requirements, and Pillar Two.

agents.name: data-protection
agents.description: Privacy and data protection law analysis. Covers GDPR, Taiwan PDPA, CCPA/CPRA, China PIPL, and cross-border data transfer mechanisms.

agents.name: drafter
agents.description: Generates legal documents including memos, briefs, contracts, opinion letters, and regulatory filings with jurisdiction-specific formatting.

agents.name: fiscal-specialist
agents.description: International tax analysis covering transfer pricing, treaty application, PE risk, CFC rules, Pillar Two, and exit taxation.

agents.name: judicial-analyst
agents.description: Neutral synthesis agent using judicial consideration methodology. Weighs advocate and adversary outputs to produce probability-weighted assessments.

agents.name: orchestrator
agents.description: Coordinates multi-agent workflows and manages pipeline execution. Routes queries to appropriate specialist agents.

agents.name: regulatory-monitor
agents.description: Watch for regulatory changes across jurisdictions

agents.name: translator
agents.description: Legal translation specialist across EN, ZH-TW, ZH-CN, FR, and DE. Maintains legal terminology accuracy with terminology tables.

agents.name: treaty-watcher
agents.description: Monitor treaty changes affecting your structures

agents.name: compliance-analyst
agents.description: Immigration and residency compliance analysis. Covers visa compliance, residency requirements, physical presence tracking, and CBI due diligence.

agents.name: pathway-researcher
agents.description: Deep research on licensing, immigration, and credential regulations

skills.name: action-executor
skills.description: Execute actions — send reports via Gmail, post to Slack, save to Google Drive. Always confirms before executing.

skills.name: adversarial-analysis
skills.description: Stress-test a legal position by evaluating arguments from both sides. Spawns advocate, adversary, and judicial-analyst agents for balanced risk assessment.

skills.name: ai-governance-triage
skills.description: Classify AI systems under the EU AI Act, identify prohibited practices, and assess high-risk AI system requirements.

skills.name: deep-research
skills.description: Deep multilingual legal research across any jurisdiction, culture, and language. Searches academic papers, expert commentary, law firm publications, government gazettes, court decisions. Reads sources in their original language (EN, ZH, JA, KO, FR, DE, ES, AR, PT, IT).

skills.name: case-atlas
skills.description: Interactive Litigation Star Atlas — 15 landmark cases across 8 jurisdictions with briefings, analysis, and research prompts.

skills.name: case-research
skills.description: Deep legal research via Westlaw Classic + CourtListener + EUR-Lex. Produces sourced research memos with verified citations.

skills.name: citation-verification
skills.description: Verify legal citations, check if cases are still good law, validate references against data sources, and tag provenance.

skills.name: cold-start-interview
skills.description: Onboard a new user or practice. Interviews you about your practice type, jurisdiction footprint, structure inventory, risk posture, compliance obligations, cultural context, and output preferences.

skills.name: compliance-checker
skills.description: Check against DAC6, CRS, FATCA, BEPS CbCR, UBO registers, and local reporting obligations.

skills.name: contract-review
skills.description: Review contracts against market standards with dual severity scoring for legal risk and business friction. Covers NDAs, vendor agreements, SaaS MSAs, and engagement letters.

skills.name: customize
skills.description: Edit the practice profile directly. Change jurisdiction footprint, risk posture, structure inventory, compliance obligations, house style, or any other section.

skills.name: entity-optimizer
skills.description: Recommend the optimal entity type and jurisdiction for a goal — LLCs, trusts, foundations, VCCs, SPCs, partnerships, corporates.

skills.name: exit-analysis
skills.description: Analyze consequences of unwinding, restructuring, or migrating — exit taxes, deemed disposals, clawbacks, liquidation sequences.

skills.name: jurisdiction-scanner
skills.description: Compare jurisdictions for a specific structuring purpose — holding company, IP vehicle, trust, treasury, operating entity.

skills.name: matter-workspace
skills.description: Per-client workspace isolation for multi-client practices.

skills.name: pillar-two-impact
skills.description: Assess OECD Pillar Two (Global Minimum Tax) impact. Calculate jurisdictional ETRs, model IIR/UTPR/QDMTT top-up.

skills.name: privacy-impact-assessment
skills.description: Conduct a Privacy Impact Assessment (PIA) or DPIA for cross-border data flows. Covers GDPR Art. 35, Taiwan PDPA, and transfer impact assessments.

skills.name: regulatory-gap-analysis
skills.description: Identify regulatory gaps and compliance shortfalls across jurisdictions. Compares against FATF, CRS, AEOI, Pillar Two, and substance rules.

skills.name: report-generator
skills.description: Generate standalone HTML reports — interactive structure diagrams, jurisdiction matrices, risk heat maps, compliance dashboards.

skills.name: risk-assessment
skills.description: Identify structure vulnerabilities — substance challenges, treaty shopping exposure, GAAR risk, upcoming regulatory changes.

skills.name: salecraft-compliance
skills.description: Review SaleCraft-generated content for legal compliance across advertising law, marketing claims, and consumer protection. Covers Taiwan Fair Trade Act, FTC guidelines, and health/cosmetics/food claims.

skills.name: structure-analysis
skills.description: Analyze a cross-border wealth structure — entities, flows, treaties, substance, TP, compliance. The core skill of the legal engineering optimizer.

skills.name: structure-designer
skills.description: Design a cross-border structure from scratch. Selects jurisdictions, entity types, flow routing, and treaty paths.

skills.name: taiwan-law-specialist
skills.description: Taiwan-specific legal analysis covering PDPA, Consumer Protection Act, Fair Trade Act, Company Act, and Securities and Exchange Act. Bilingual analysis with proper Taiwan citation format.

skills.name: legal-dashboard
skills.description: Generate self-contained HTML dashboards with live filtering, sorting, and risk visualization for compliance, matter status, or jurisdiction comparison.

skills.name: transfer-pricing-review
skills.description: Review intercompany transactions against arm’s-length standard. FAR analysis, methodology selection, BEPS risk flags.

skills.name: tp-documentation-generation
skills.description: Generate OECD BEPS Action 13 documentation from a transfer-pricing-review — Master File, Local File, and CbCR outlines with the selected arm’s-length method, FAR analysis, and documentation-gap flags. Rendering hands off to Content-Gen.

skills.name: treaty-mapper
skills.description: Map the bilateral tax treaty network between jurisdictions. Find optimal routing paths to minimize withholding tax.

skills.name: trust-governance
skills.description: Analyze trust structures — fiduciary duties, protector powers, beneficiary rights, VCC sub-fund governance.

skills.name: aviation-licensing
skills.description: Compare aviation authorities and design fastest path to pilot certification — PPL, IR, ME, type ratings, aircraft registry, ownership structures.

skills.name: cold-start-interview
skills.description: Onboarding interview for Legal Pathways. Captures background, qualifications, target credentials, budget, timeline, risk tolerance.

skills.name: credential-engineering
skills.description: Analyze credential gaps and design pathway to professional licenses across borders — education, exams, supervised hours, visa strategy.

skills.name: gap-analysis
skills.description: General gap identification across any regulatory domain. Produces prioritized gap matrix with cost, timeline, and CTAs.

skills.name: immigration-pathway
skills.description: Analyze immigration options and design optimal pathway to citizenship, PR, or work authorization — CBI, skilled worker, points systems, leverage.

skills.name: legal-translation
skills.description: Translate legal documents with precision across EN, ZH-TW, ZH-CN, FR, and DE. Produces terminology tables and flags untranslatable legal concepts.

skills.name: matter-workspace
skills.description: Create and manage structured matter workspaces for legal projects. Tracks deadlines, parties, documents, and correspondence with cross-session memory.

skills.name: pathway-comparison
skills.description: Compare multiple pathway options across jurisdictions with cost-benefit analysis and scored comparison matrices.

skills.name: sovereign-architect
skills.description: Design complete sovereign individual architecture using flag theory — citizenship, tax residence, business, assets, lifestyle, digital, aviation.
